# MithEdu-SmallProject

A multi-page student portal implementing REST APIs, LocalStorage, and complex form validation with a sleek, colorful UI.

![CI/CD](https://github.com/placeholder/MithEdu/actions/workflows/ci-cd.yml/badge.svg)
![Auto-Doc](https://github.com/placeholder/MithEdu/actions/workflows/repo-analysis.yml/badge.svg)

## 📖 Project Overview

This repository is autonomously analyzed and documented by GitHub Actions and AI agents. It features a student portal with automated CI/CD and self-updating documentation.

## 🚀 Setup & Deployment

1. Clone the repository.
2. Open `index.html` in your browser.
3. Everything is automatically handled by GitHub Actions on push!

## 🤝 Contribution Guide

Contributions are welcome! Please create a PR, and our autonomous AI Documentation Agent will review your structural changes and verify documentation updates.
